project.name: project gabut
project.currentFocus: Arcade Quest 3D Cabinet UI upgrade: real WebGL (R3F) hero on landing + login/register welcome panels, evolving the neobrutalism theme with cel-shaded low-poly 3D under strict SSR/perf/a11y fallbacks
durableFacts: SkillPath uses Next.js App Router, Supabase Auth/RLS, and a neobrutalism UI system.
User dashboard lives at /dashboard; admin dashboard lives at /admin and is guarded by profiles.role.
Production cron sync requires CRON_SECRET via Bearer token or x-cron-secret header.

3D is built with @react-three/fiber v8 + drei + three (React 18); WebGL is isolated behind components/three/scene-frame.tsx via dynamic(ssr:false) + IntersectionObserver lazy mount, with a static poster fallback for reduced-motion/no-WebGL/offscreen/context-loss. Never import the components/three barrel from a server module (it would defeat the three.js code-split).
Design contract is docs/DESIGN.md (Arcade Quest 3D Cabinet). 3D material law: flat meshToon + black drei <Outlines>, palette fills, cabinet tokens #1A1726/#241F35, no glass/chrome/PBR/network HDR.

lastAchievements: Evolved the design contract (docs/DESIGN.md) to Arcade Quest 3D Cabinet with a binding 3D material law, WebGL performance/resilience gates, and an updated Previous-Directions ledger.

Built an accessible R3F scene library: components/three/arcade-scene.tsx (cel-shaded low-poly cabinet + floating coins/tiles/gems, hard black Outlines, explicit lights) and components/three/scene-frame.tsx (SSR-safe lazy mount + reduced-motion/no-WebGL/offscreen/context-loss poster fallback).

Wired the WebGL hero into the landing page and a lg+-only 3D cabinet topper into login/register via AuthFormLayout; three.js is code-split into a separate ~652KB async chunk (not in any page first-load JS).

Ran a 19-agent adversarial audit (a11y, WebGL/SSR/perf, design-contract, responsive, correctness) and fixed all 14 confirmed findings, including a systemic tailwind border-3 no-op (added borderWidth '3':'3px') and post-mount WebGL context-loss handling.
pendingIssues: Visually verify the 3D scenes in a real browser (lighting brightness, cabinet readability against the dark frame, mobile landing WebGL perf/INP).
Spot-check the static poster fallback by forcing prefers-reduced-motion and a no-WebGL context.
Confirm the restored border-3 / border-b-3 outlines did not alter spacing on dense pre-existing layouts that previously rendered with no border.
nextBestActions: Run `npm run dev`, open /, /login, /register and confirm the cabinet scene renders, sways to the pointer, and the foreground HUD stays readable.
Toggle OS reduced-motion and reload to confirm the static Quest Map poster replaces the Canvas.
Sanity-check small-screen widths for overflow around the landing hero scene frame and HUD strip.
validationState: npm run typecheck passed on 2026-06-20 for the 3D redesign (pre-audit-fix run).

npm run build passed on 2026-06-20 after clearing a stale .next cache (the /_document collect-page-data crash was stale-cache, not a code error); all target pages prerender static, three.js code-split.
Re-run of typecheck/build after the 14 audit fixes pending (Bash classifier was briefly unavailable).

designContinuity.currentConceptualAnchor: Arcade Quest 3D Cabinet — neobrutalism base + real-time cel-shaded WebGL arcade cabinet/collectibles; dark cabinet zones for 3D, cream body for legibility
